title: Growth Energy Urges Lawmakers to Support Year-End Funding Package That Includes E15 Legislative Fix
content: Growth Energy, the nationâ€™s largest biofuel trade association, urged lawmakers to support a year-end funding package that includes a legislative fix that would allow for the year-round sale of E15, a blend of gasoline and 15% American bioethanol that costs less than standard fuel, lowers emissions, and can be used in 96% of all cars on the road today.
author: Analysts Account
